title: StikyStone
description: My Redstone texture pack, making components more clean.
body:
Unleash the full potential of your Redstone creations with StikyStone! This texture pack brings a fresh and innovative look to all your Redstone components, making your engineering marvels not only functionally impressive but also visually stunning.

Vibrant Redstone Dust: Watch your Redstone lines come to life with a bright, eye-catching design that ensures every connection is clear and dynamic.
Distinctive Torches and Repeaters: Each torch and repeater is designed with unique textures to easily identify and differentiate them in your complex circuits.

Perfect for Redstone enthusiasts, engineers, and builders alike, StikyStone ensures your contraptions are not only efficient but also a treat for the eyes. Transform your Redstone experience with the StikyStone texture pack!

I recommend using this with something like Vanilla Tweaks or Redstone Tweaks to have signal strengths displayed on dust!
![The blocks changed by StikyStone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e464f5a3e9dd0ae45b0572857bd4835d6236f4c.png)
